subcodes.first_line: The mention from the Wronged One unto all who are in the world is to draw them nigh unto God, inasmuch as He hath come with manifest sovereignty and hath appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکره من لدی المظلوم لمن فی العالم لیقربهم الی الله اذ اتی بسلطان مبین و اظهر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation of the Cause (general or uncategorized), @goodly deeds; actions, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @consolation and comfort, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
